---

**Quality-gate checklist** (please confirm):

- [ ] The project has a README covering purpose, install steps, supported Magento versions, and requirements.
- [ ] There is at least one tagged release (for GitHub repos and Packagist packages).
- [ ] The resource is still actively maintained OR is a canonical reference (Adobe docs, etc.).
- [ ] The entry isn't already covered by the weekly discovery bot (check issue #135 first).
